Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext

package org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.marshall
    Marshalling API
  • Class
    Description
    PlainText
    Annotation that can be applied to classes, fields, and methods to tweak how they are handled by PlainTextSerializer and PlainTextParser.
    PlainTextAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @PlainText annotation.
    PlainTextAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    PlainTextApply
    Dynamically applies a @PlainText annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
    PlainTextApply.Array
    A collection of @PlainTextApply annotations.
    PlainTextApplyAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @PlainTextApply annotation.
    PlainTextApplyAnnotation.Applier
    Applies targeted PlainTextApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
    PlainTextApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    PlainTextBeanPropertyMeta
    Metadata on bean properties specific to the PlainText serializers and parsers pulled from the @PlainText annotation on the bean property.
    PlainTextClassMeta
    Metadata on classes specific to the PlainText serializers and parsers pulled from the @PlainText annotation on the class.
    PlainTextConfig
    Annotation for specifying config properties defined in PlainTextSerializer and PlainTextParser.
    PlainTextConfigAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @PlainTextConfig annotation.
    PlainTextConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
    Applies PlainTextConfig annotations to a PlainTextParser.Builder.
    PlainTextConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
    Applies PlainTextConfig annotations to a PlainTextSerializer.Builder.
    PlainTextMetaProvider
    Interface for providing access to PlainTextClassMeta and PlainTextBeanPropertyMeta objects.
    PlainTextParser
    Parsers HTTP plain text request bodies into Group 5 POJOs.
    PlainTextParser.Builder
    Builder class.
    PlainTextParserSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of PlainTextParser.
    PlainTextParserSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    PlainTextSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to plain text using just the toString() method on the serialized object.
    PlainTextSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    PlainTextSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of PlainTextSerializer.
    PlainTextSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.
